chapter_title.ar: باب الَّتِي لَا تَحِلُّ لِزَوْجِهَا حَتَّى تَنْكِحَ زَوْجاً غَيْرَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 17 – (That) which does not make her to be Permissible for her husband unless she married another husband

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/129)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/129)
text: الْمُطَلَّقَةِ التَّطْلِيقَةَ الثَّالِثَةَ لَا تَحِلُّ لَهُ حَتَّى تَنْكِحَ زَوْجاً غَيْرَهُ وَ يَذُوقَ عُسَيْلَتَهَا .

en.hubeali: Safwan, from Ibn Muskan, from Abu Baseer,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>: ‘Regarding the divorced woman with the third divorce, she is not Permissible for him until she married another husband and he tastes her honey (sleeps with her)’.
en.sarwar: 5. Safwan has narrated from ibn Muskan from abu Basir who has said the following: “About the case of a woman who is divorced for the third time, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ’She cannot become lawful in marriage for her previous husband until she marries another man who tastes her honey (goes to bed with her).”’
